verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My sleep is gone, my heart is full of sorrow I can't believe how much I've let you down I dread the pain that waits for me tomorrow When the sun reveals my broken dreams scattered on the ground

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Please forgive me I need your grace to make it through All I have is you, I'm at your mercy Lord, I'll serve you Until my dying day Help others find the way At your mercy, please forgive me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I can't believe the God of earth and glory Would take the time to care for one like me But I read in the bible that old story How he plead for my forgiveness while He was dying on a tree.
